quantification.why: Essentially every comparison carries a computed figure — '12.89% more', 'North exceeded West by 53.82%', '33.43% of total', '52.74% below Gadget's'.

specificity.why: Each recommendation names a specific product/region with figures ('Test Sprocket promotions; its $1,130.50 revenue was 52.74% below Gadget's').

insight_density.why: Surfaces multiple actionable observations about concentration and gaps ('$2,392.00 revenue was 33.43% of total', 'North's $2,176.35 was 30.42% of total', Sprocket '52.74% below').

quantification.why: Every comparison carries a computed figure — 'Gadget generated $2,392.00, 12.89% more than Widget's $2,118.94', 'North exceeded West by 53.82%', and each recommendation cites a percentage.

specificity.why: All three recommendations name specific products/regions with data-grounded figures, e.g. 'Test Sprocket promotions; its $1,130.50 revenue was 52.74% below Gadget's'.

insight_density.why: The prose surfaces concentration and gaps beyond the tables, noting Gadget was '33.43% of total', North '30.42% of total', and Sprocket '52.74% below Gadget's'.
